title: Ubiquiti UniFi AP U7-Outdoor
description: Ubiquiti U7 Outdoor is a new outdoor dual-band unit supporting Wi-Fi 7 . It operates in the 2.4 GHz band at a speed of 688 Mb/s and in the 5 GHz band at a speed of 4.3 Gb/s. Two external antennas can be added to the unit using RP-SMA connectors on the top. For network connection, a LAN port with a speed of up to 2.5 Gb/s is available. The access point is powered via PoE+ The access point offers wide mounting options for the wall and pole, and the mounting accessories are included in the package The device requires downloading the official UniFi Controller software from the official website, which enables centralized network management. A significant advantage of the UniFi Controller is that it is completely free without any limitations ! This central management system allows you to upload maps, configure basic parameters such as SSID, guest accounts, splash pages, traffic statistics, and view a list and status of connected clients quickly and easily Zero Handoff Roaming - seamless transition between access points Wireless uplink (ideal for locations where a data cable cannot be run) Up to 8 SSIDs Detailed traffic statistics Guest network Voucher system Load balancing - maintaining balanced client distribution Bandwidth limiting for each SSID Device Wall and pole mounts Drilling template Cable tie Mounting kit
